description_long: This object is a classic brass chamberstick candle holder with a white taper candle. The holder features a wide, flat circular base for stability, a short stem with decorative beading, and a raised drip plate to catch melted wax. A prominent round handle with a thumb rest is attached to the side, allowing for easy carrying. The candle itself is tall and slender, with a smooth surface and a few visible wax drips. The brass finish gives the holder a warm, antique appearance, making it suitable for both decorative and functional use in urban settings.
description: A brass chamberstick candle holder with a white taper candle, featuring a wide base and a round carrying handle. The candle shows some wax drips, and the holder has a classic, antique look.
description_view_0: This view highlights the round handle and thumb rest on the left side of the brass base, as well as the decorative beading on the stem.
description_view_1: The handle is not visible from this angle, showing only the circular base, stem, and the white candle with wax drips.
description_view_2: The handle is now on the right side, clearly visible, and the beaded detail on the stem is prominent.
description_view_3: This view shows the handle directly behind the base, with the front of the base and stem unobstructed.
